description: Configure a wholesale pricing structure for 'TechStart Inc.' and verify it with a transaction. Create a price list named 'Wholesale' and add 'House Blend Coffee Beans 1kg' at a price of $18.50. Assign this price list to the customer 'TechStart Inc.' and process a cash sale for them containing one unit of 'House Blend Coffee Beans 1kg'. Save the resulting receipt as a PDF to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\wholesale_receipt.pdf'.
